boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IAM execute the emergency admin enablement?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; audit-control pending blocks closure
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Policy requires full match before execution

final_answer: Source records show BG-UMA-075 covers user, system, privilege and time but leaves audit-control assignment pending. STD-UMA-075-P mandates complete match before enablement. Boundary remains open. Action may not proceed. Escalate for resolution of pending assignment.
